div1.entryFree:
Sprinkle, 1) to scatter in drops: --s in your faces your reeking villany, Tim. III, 6, 102. upon the heat and flame of thy distemper s. cool patience, Hml. III, 4, 124.
2) to scatter on in drops, to besprinkle: that blood should s. me to make me grow, R2 V, 6, 46. s. our society with thankfulness, Tim. III, 6, 79.
